headline: E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley Releases Monthly Sector Rotation Study
summary: NEW YORK, May 01, 2026--E*TRADE from Morgan Stanley today released the data from its monthly sector rotation study, which indicates whether clients were net buyers or sellers in each of the 11 core stock market sectors defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). headline: How The Personalis (PSNL) Story Is Shifting With Cautious Targets And Execution Risks
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for Personalis has been nudged to US$11.29 from US$11.00, a small adjustment that still matters if you are tracking valuation closely. This shift aligns with recent, more cautious commentary that balances higher expected net losses and spending with an unchanged rating. Together, these factors signal a blend of potential and execution risk. As you read on, you will see how this updated price target fits into the broader narrative and what to watch to stay on...
